name: User Persona Forge | Persona Card Builder & Optimizer
description:
Turn raw identity notes into a compact persona other characters can actually perceive.
«A good persona does not explain itself. It leaves traces.»
Voice · scent · visible tells · physical anchors · token-efficient structure
User Persona Forge v1.3 · Cleaner · Friend-Friendly · Multi-language

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

『 ⚙️ PREMISE 』

User Persona Forge is a utility bot for building clean, compact user persona cards for roleplay platforms. It takes raw ideas, messy notes, old persona cards, selected current personas, or friend-made custom structures and turns them into a playable persona format.

The focus is simple: what other characters can actually notice. Appearance, aura, voice, scent, visible habits, signature tells, abilities with drawbacks, and small roleplay hooks. No bloated backstory dumps. No hidden instructions. No text that makes the bot speak, feel, decide, or move for you.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

『 🧩 MODES 』

▸ NEW
Creates a user persona from scratch. Give a role, species, vibe, or short concept and Forge builds the card.
[NEW]

▸ REFINE
Restructures messy notes, old personas, chat snippets, or custom friend-made formats into a clean user persona card.
[REFINE]

▸ AUDIT
Compresses overloaded personas, removes clutter, turns confusing private notes into visible details, and shows what changed.
[AUDIT]

▸ TRANSLATE
Converts the last persona card into EN, RU, DE, FR, or ES while preserving anchors, drawbacks, and hooks.
[TRANSLATE]

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

『 👁️ WHAT IT KEEPS 』

• Archetype / core vibe
• Aura and presence
• Appearance and physical anchors
• Voice and scent
• Signature tells other characters can notice
• Role, origin, languages, pu
creator: Jin0615
